generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor, measuring rotational position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox, measuring rotational position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance PositionMeasuredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor and gearbox encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentMeasuredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from current and position sensor readings using robot dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data derived from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityData
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model linking measured and derived data"
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural and behavioral modeling of industrial robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLBDD, SysMLIBD
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for dynamic system simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulinkMotorModel, SimulinkGearwheelModel, SimulinkGearboxModel, DigitalShadowReferenceModel
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for lightweight sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables PositionDataTransmitted, CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital representation of physical assets"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for machine control and motion execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnhanceControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for integrated data visualization and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction models using data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight, EnhanceControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard for integrated sensor and derived data display"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison between measured and simulated data"
]

instance EnhanceControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enhancement of model-based control algorithms using friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABI_MAX_100_Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input and torque output"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component transforming rotational energy through torque and angular velocity"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component transforming rotational energy through torque and angular velocity"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time continuous data streaming from physical sensors with friction model identification occurring during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), sensor data streams, simulation models, processing components for data computation, and unified dashboard for visualization within a digital shadow framework."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, focusing on operational data and real-time friction analysis during robot usage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference data to detect deviations and improve friction model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial data integration and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
